2.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
2.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

2.gl: a desert; especially (with the article prefix) the (generally) sterile valley of the Jordan and its continuation to the Red Sea

2.gl: the south (from its drought); specifically, the Negeb or southern district of Judah, occasionally, Egypt (as south to Palestine)
